raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"The delegation asks to check whether the argumentative conclusion of consistent, uniform superiority follows from the mixed benchmark results.","R1.3":"The artifact's central vulnerability is whether claims about stability, tracking improvements, and broad applicability are supported by the reported plant-level evidence.","RX.1":"The projection should preserve uncertainty because the artifact provides only excerpted results and omits some baseline details.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing because the text asserts uniform superiority despite regressions and missing comparisons.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is load-bearing because the task is only to project responsibility, not to edit or evaluate the paper directly.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is relevant because the artifact concerns safety-critical control deployment claims.","RX.5":"Traceability is needed so responsibility assignments remain grounded in the delegation and artifact rather than inferred external facts."}}

rationale.R1.2: The delegation asks to check whether the argumentative conclusion of consistent, uniform superiority follows from the mixed benchmark results.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact's central vulnerability is whether claims about stability, tracking improvements, and broad applicability are supported by the reported plant-level evidence.
rationale.RX.1: The projection should preserve uncertainty because the artifact provides only excerpted results and omits some baseline details.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing because the text asserts uniform superiority despite regressions and missing comparisons.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is load-bearing because the task is only to project responsibility, not to edit or evaluate the paper directly.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is relevant because the artifact concerns safety-critical control deployment claims.
rationale.RX.5: Traceability is needed so responsibility assignments remain grounded in the delegation and artifact rather than inferred external facts.
